description: Style Note Luxurious comfort is teamed with style in these pair of blue canvas shoes from gliders. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style for a casual look. Product Details Round blunt toed denim shoes with lace-up fastening Denim upper, has a rubber toe cap, reinforced overlay at the heel collar and branding in the midfoot region Soft footbed with slight padding around the mouth Upper adhered to the outsole Thick rubber outsole with patterned lugs and branding on the lateral side Comes with a shoe bag Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
